contribution.title: Calabi-Yau manifolds
contribution.description: Proved the Calabi conjecture, establishing the existence of Ricci-flat Kähler manifolds, now central to string theory.
contribution.relevance_to_blackhole_ds: Speculative_extension; useful as a lens for reasoning about higher-dimensional generalizations.

contribution.title: Positive mass theorem
contribution.description: Proved (with Schoen) that the ADM mass of an asymptotically flat spacetime obeying the dominant energy condition is non-negative.
contribution.relevance_to_blackhole_ds: Bounds the analytic_classical claims about black-hole masses in the project.

reasoning_lens.proof_standard: Rigorous global analysis on manifolds; PDE methods on geometric structures.
reasoning_lens.favorite_question: What global PDE governs this geometric quantity?
What energy condition is implicitly assumed?
reasoning_lens.failure_mode: Mathematical rigor sometimes outpaces physical relevance.

reference.citation: Schoen, R., Yau, S.-T. (1979). On the proof of the positive mass conjecture in general relativity. Comm. Math. Phys. 65, 45.

how_to_apply.when_to_consult: Reviewing global claims about masses, energy conditions, or higher-dimensional generalizations.
how_to_apply.cautions: Calabi-Yau / string-theory connections are speculative_extension for this project.
